title: Zagreb、City of Zagreb — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Zagreb、City of Zagrebの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

ZagrebはCity of Zagrebにある人口806,341の都市です。Croatia’s vibrant capital, a city of Austro-Hungarian elegance, colorful street art, a thriving café culture, and the historic Upper Town with its medieval charm.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
